summary: Completed testing of Anka CS Hub Section 4 - Microsoft 365 Integration features. 14/14 backend tests pass. All frontend UI components working correctly. Fixed CalendarPage endpoint mismatch bug.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with gayatri.garg@anka.health / anka2026!
Backend: GET /api/integrations returns list with microsoft_365 integration
Backend: POST /api/integrations/microsoft-365/configure validates missing fields (400)
Backend: POST /api/integrations/microsoft-365/configure saves configuration (200)
Backend: POST /api/integrations/microsoft-365/test returns error for invalid Azure credentials
Backend: GET /api/email/threads returns 400 when M365 not connected
Backend: GET /api/email/thread/{id} returns 400 when M365 not connected
Backend: POST /api/email/draft-reply returns 400 when M365 not connected
Backend: POST /api/email/send returns 400 when M365 not connected
Backend: GET /api/calendar/events returns 400 when M365 not connected
Backend: POST /api/calendar/create-event returns 400 when M365 not connected
Backend: M365 configure endpoint requires authentication (401)
Backend: M365 test connection endpoint requires authentication (401)
Frontend: Settings > Integrations tab visible with M365 configuration form
Frontend: Settings > Integrations shows Tenant ID, Client ID, Client Secret, Shared Mailbox fields
Frontend: Settings > Integrations shows Save Configuration button
Frontend: Settings > Integrations shows Test Connection button
Frontend: Settings > Integrations shows error status badge (disconnected/error)
Frontend: Settings > Integrations shows Azure AD Setup instructions (5 steps)
Frontend: Communications > Outlook Inbox tab visible
Frontend: Communications > Outlook Inbox shows 'M365 not connected' message when not configured
Frontend: Communications > Outlook Inbox shows link to Settings > Integrations
Frontend: Calendar shows Schedule Review button
Frontend: Calendar shows Filter by Team Member dropdown
Frontend: Calendar shows legend with Outlook Event color
Frontend: Calendar Schedule Review dialog opens correctly with Client, Review Type, Date, Time, Duration, Attendees
bugs_fixed_during_testing: Fixed CalendarPage.js endpoint mismatch: changed /scheduled-reviews to /reviews (line 103, 144)
critical_code_review_comments: M365 integration uses msal library for OAuth client credentials flow - correctly implemented
Email/calendar endpoints properly check for M365 connection before attempting Graph API calls
PHI scrubbing is applied to email content before storing/returning
Test Connection gracefully returns error status (200 with error message) rather than throwing 500
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds microsoft_365 integration on startup with disconnected status
context_for_next_testing_agent: M365 integration implemented but requires real Azure AD credentials to test actual email/calendar functionality. All endpoints return 400 gracefully when M365 not connected. The Configure/Test flow in Settings > Integrations works - Test Connection returns error for invalid credentials as expected. Outlook Inbox tab shows 'not connected' message. Calendar shows Outlook Event in legend.

mocked_features.m365_emails: MOCKED - requires real Azure AD credentials
mocked_features.m365_calendar: MOCKED - requires real Azure AD credentials

section_4_features_verified.msal_library_integration: PASS - msal used for client credentials flow
section_4_features_verified.settings_integrations_tab: PASS - M365 configuration form with all fields
section_4_features_verified.communications_outlook_inbox_tab: PASS - Shows not connected message with link to settings
section_4_features_verified.calendar_outlook_events_legend: PASS - Shows Outlook Event in calendar legend
